Join Our Team

Work alongside BFSI leaders and banking veterans. Empower fresh graduates and build the ultimate retail banking talent pipeline.

Home / Careers

Current Openings

Join TrueKnack and help us groom, mentor, and place the next generation of banking professionals.

Lead Retail Banking Trainer

Thane (Mumbai) / Hybrid Full-Time

Conduct live interactive training sessions for graduates covering retail assets/liabilities products, clearing transactions, KYC, and branch operations compliance.

  • Ex-Banker with 10+ years of branch banking experience (HDFC, ICICI, Axis, SBI).
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and mentoring skills.
  • Prior training or coaching experience is a major plus.
Apply Now

Admissions Counselor & Advisor

Thane Head Office Full-Time

Consult with fresh graduates and their parents. Explain retail banking career scopes, verify eligibility, and enroll candidates into our certified programs.

  • Graduate in any stream with 1-3 years of counseling or sales experience.
  • Strong persuasive skills, empathy, and active listening skills.
  • Fluency in Marathi, Hindi, and English.
Apply Now
